articles.headline: Apple's Brand-New Products Represent an Aggressive AI Push
articles.summary: Apple's product blitz this week highlights how deeply artificial intelligence is penetrating the tech giant's hardware lineup.

articles.headline: Gemini Lawsuit And Apple Deal Reframe Alphabet’s AI Risk And Reward
articles.summary: Alphabet (NasdaqGS:GOOGL) is facing a landmark wrongful death lawsuit alleging its Gemini chatbot contributed to an individual's suicide. The case is described as the first of its kind involving a major consumer AI product and raises new legal and ethical questions for AI developers. Separately, Apple and Alphabet have agreed a multi year collaboration that will see Google's Gemini models and cloud services support Siri. The partnership positions Google's AI and cloud stack at the core of a...

articles.headline: Nasdaq in lead as stocks open higher despite Middle East conflict continuing
